component.name: Lockbook
component.summary: Encrypted personal journal powered by TimENC

description.p: Lockbook is a secure encrypted diary that uses TimENC (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + Argon2id) to protect your entries.
TimENC encryption is built in, so no separate tools need to be installed.
TimENC is now bundled directly into Lockbook.

ul.li: Encryption now runs in-process — no separate TimENC install required on any platform.
Fixes "TimENC encryption failed" / "TimENC CLI is not installed" errors in the Flatpak and .deb builds.
Removed the host-access requirement from the Flatpak sandbox.
